features.name: Lesson Management
features.description: Edit (rename) and delete lessons with cascade confirmation

features.name: Step 2: Detailed Outline
features.description: AI-generated detailed outline with JSON editing

features.name: Step 5: PPTX Generation
features.description: Template selection, image generation, PPTX export

features.name: Step 6: Question Bank
features.description: Interactive (MC/MR) + Review (Bloom taxonomy) questions + Excel export

features.name: Dynamic Model Discovery
features.description: Auto-detect from CLIProxy + Gemini SDK simultaneously

features.name: Per-Task Model Selection
features.description: Users pick independent models for OUTLINE, SLIDES, SPEAKER_NOTES, QUESTIONS, IMAGE, TTS

features.name: Synchronized [Source] Labels
features.description: All selectors display [Source] model_name format, CLIProxy first

features.name: Speaker Notes Model Selection
features.description: Independent AI model for speaker note generation

features.name: ViTTS OmniVoice Multi-Mode
features.description: 3 modes: Auto Voice, Voice Design (gender/age/pitch/style/accent), Voice Cloning (ref library). Async job polling.

features.name: ViTTS Options Discovery
features.description: GET /user/model-config/vitts-options endpoint fetches modes, voice library, design attributes from ViTTS server

features.name: Audio ZIP Download
features.description: Download all slide audio as ZIP (archiver)

features.name: Flux Image Gen API
features.description: Integrates ComfyUI Flux endpoint via ImagenService. Native compatibility with AI parameters.

features.name: VietNormalizer Integration
features.description: Removed by user. Functionality moved native to TTS provider
